creator: erik@wsr.se
text:
If I install apr with support for mySQL 8x the lib file apr_dbd_mysql.so will not build correct. The port installation has no Error 1 messages but a warning message for my_init. Then trying to load the lib file into Apache 24 the following error message appear


Cannot load /usr/local/lib/apr-util-1/apr_dbd_mysql.so into server: /usr/local/lib/apr-util-1/apr_dbd_mysql.so: Undefined symbol "my_init"

Tested on
Freebsd 14.1
Apache/2.4.62
mysql84-server-8.4.2_1
apr-1.7.5.1.6.3
